understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through the KA59 puzzle levels by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; when all goals are covered simultaneously, the level reports WIN, and finishing the final level wins the run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (up/down/left/right) shift only the currently selected piece on a 3-pixels-per-cell grid where positions are given as [x, y] pixel coordinates. If a pushable object (e.g., a block) is directly adjacent in the movement direction and space allows, it can be pushed along with the moving piece; otherwise movement can be blocked by walls/obstacles or boundaries, which may behave inconsistently and require testing. Levels may have multiple selectable pieces; control is switched by CLICKing the exact pixel-coordinate position of another selectable, after which movement applies to that newly selected piece. The movement_blocked hints indicate nearby adjacency but don’t guarantee the move will fail.
